children.heading: Appropriate congressional committees
children.label: 1 Appropriate congressional committees
children.text: The term “appropriate congressional committees” means the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation and the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs of the Senate and the Committee on Homeland Security and the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 2 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Homeland Security.

children.heading: Department
children.label: 3 Department
children.text: The term “Department” means the Department of Homeland Security.

children.heading: Over-the-road bus
children.label: 4 Over-the-road bus
children.text: The term “over-the-road bus” means a bus characterized by an elevated passenger deck located over a baggage compartment.

children.heading: Over-the-road bus frontline employees
children.label: 5 Over-the-road bus frontline employees
children.text: In this section, the term “over-the-road bus frontline employees” means over-the-road bus drivers, security personnel, dispatchers, maintenance and maintenance support personnel, ticket agents, other terminal employees, and other employees of an over-the-road bus operator or terminal owner or operator that the Secretary determines should receive security training under this subchapter.1So in original. “In this section,” probably should not appear.1

children.heading: Railroad frontline employees
children.label: 6 Railroad frontline employees
children.text: In this section, the term “railroad frontline employees” means security personnel, dispatchers, locomotive engineers, conductors, trainmen, other onboard employees, maintenance and maintenance support personnel, bridge tenders, and any other employees of railroad carriers that the Secretary determines should receive security training under this subchapter.1

children.heading: Railroad
children.label: 7 Railroad
children.text: The term “railroad” has the meaning that term has in .section 20102 of title 49

children.heading: Railroad carrier
children.label: 8 Railroad carrier
children.text: The term “railroad carrier” has the meaning that term has in .section 20102 of title 49

children.heading: State
children.label: 9 State
children.text: The term “State” means any one of the 50 States, the District of Columbia, Puerto Rico, the Northern Mariana Islands, the Virgin Islands, Guam, American Samoa, and any other territory or possession of the United States.

children.heading: Terrorism
children.label: 10 Terrorism
children.text: The term “terrorism” has the meaning that term has in .section 101 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: in the jurisdiction of the United States between a place in a State and a place outside the State (including a place outside the United States); or

children.label: B
children.text: in a State that affects trade, traffic, and transportation described in subparagraph (A).

children.heading: United States
children.label: 12 United States
children.text: The term “United States” means the 50 States, the District of Columbia, Puerto Rico, the Northern Mariana Islands, the Virgin Islands, Guam, American Samoa, and any other territory or possession of the United States.

children.label: C
children.text: Materials poisonous or toxic by inhalation, including Division 2.3 gases and Division 6.1 materials.

children.label: D
children.text: A select agent or toxin regulated by the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention under part 73 of title 42, Code of Federal Regulations.

children.heading: Disadvantaged business concerns
children.label: 14 Disadvantaged business concerns
children.text: The term “disadvantaged business concerns” means small businesses that are owned and controlled by socially and economically disadvantaged individuals as defined in section 124, of title 13, Code of Federal Regulations.2So in original. Probably should be “part 124,”.2

children.heading: Amtrak
children.label: 15 Amtrak
children.text: The term “Amtrak” means the National Railroad Passenger Corporation.
